Curated dashboards overview
Supported in:
Google secops
SIEM
Google SecOps offers curated dashboards—predefined dashboards designed
for visibility across various security use cases. While you cannot edit or delete
curated dashboards, you can create a copy and customize it to fit your needs.
For more information on how to create dashboards,
see
Manage dashboards
.
Need more help?
Get answers from Community members and Google SecOps professionals.
